testcase.name: Do a GET on /hsms to retrieve a list of HSMs and each single HSM.
Do a GET on /hsms/:hsmid/keys to retrieve a list of keys and each single key.
Do a GET on /keys to retrieve a list of keys and each single key.
Do a GET on /keydomains to retrieve a list of key domainss and each single key domain.
Do a GET on /keydomains/:keydomainid/keys to retrieve a list of keys and each single key.
